info.name: Felbo API
info.description: Complete Felbo backend API collection with auto token management and dynamic variables.

request.description: Fetches booking summary for User (typically for showing today's upcoming booking on home screen).

query.description: Search by shop name or service name
Filter by shop type: MENS, WOMENS, UNISEX

request.description: Search for shops based on text query, type, categories, and location proximity.
Cancels a booking. If cancelled within the free window, advance payment is refunded to the wallet as coins (COIN_REFUND).

Allows a barber to mark a booking as NO_SHOW if the customer hasn't arrived. 

**Rules:**
1. Barber must be assigned to this booking.
2. Booking status must be CONFIRMED or COMPLETED.
3. Barber must wait at least 10 minutes after the booking's `startTime` before marking it as no-show.
4. If the booking was COMPLETED by the barber (using verification code), it cannot be marked as no-show.

query.description: Filter by MENS, WOMENS, or ALL. Omit to fetch all applicable services.

request.description: Fetches a list of barbers who can perform the selected services in a specific shop.
Fetches available time slots for a specific date, barber, and services.
Retrieves the user's total FelboCoin balance and a paginated history of coin transactions (earned, redeemed, refunded, or reversed).

query.description: Number of notifications to return. Default: 20, Max: 50.
ISO datetime from previous response.nextCursor for pagination.
ISO datetime from previous response.nextCursor for pagination.

request.description: Returns the registration fee, GST percentage, GST amount, and total amount for independent vendor registration.

Deactivates the vendor account. This will set the account status to 'DELETED', record the deactivation timestamp, invalidate the current session via Redis, and mark all associated shops as unavailable. There is a 10-day grace period during which the vendor cannot log in. After 10 days, logging in via OTP will automatically reactivate the account and restore shop availability.

body.raw:
{
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "name": "Style Beard Premium",
  "basePrice": 250,
  "baseDurationMinutes": 40,
  "applicableFor": "MENS",
  "description": "Professional scissor cut with styling"
}

exec: pm.test('updated name matches', function () { pm.expect(res.data.name).to.equal('Premium Fade Updated'); });
console.log('Service toggled. isActive:', res.data.isActive, '| status:', res.data.status);
pm.test('at least one item returned', function () { pm.expect(res.data.length).to.be.above(0); });

item.name: Generate Upload URL - File Too Large (400)
Verify Upload - File Not In S3 (404)

query.description: Optional shop ID to filter stats

request.description: Get dashboard statistics for the vendor, optionally filtered by shop.

query.description: CONFIRMED | COMPLETED | CANCELLED_BY_USER | CANCELLED_BY_VENDOR | NO_SHOW | CANCELLED
Number of notifications to return. Default: 20, Max: 50.
ISO datetime from previous response.nextCursor for pagination.

variable.description: One of: booking_settings, cancellation_settings, abuse_limits, search_settings, issue_settings

request.description: Returns stats for Super Admin and Sub Admin dashboard.
Returns stats for Association Admin dashboard.

query.description: Search by vendor name or phone

request.description: Generates a pre-signed S3 URL for uploading a new avatar image.
Saves a new avatar record after successful S3 upload.
Deletes an avatar record and its file from S3.

query.description: Optional search term for booking ID or user name
Choice: COIN_EARNED, COIN_REDEEMED, COIN_REFUND, COIN_REVERSAL, ADMIN_CREDIT, ADMIN_DEBIT

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Updated Event Title",
  "description": "Updated description for the event.",
  "image": "{{eventImageKey}}",
  "date": "2026-05-01T10:00:00.000Z",
  "isActive": true
}

query.description: Required. Comma-separated MongoDB ObjectIds of the selected services. e.g. id1,id2,id3
Today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Only today is accepted.
Comma-separated list of service IDs (MongoDB ObjectIds). e.g. id1,id2

request.description: Marks a booking as completed. This triggers a COIN_EARNED transaction for the user.

Allows a barber to mark a booking as NO_SHOW if the customer hasn't arrived. 

**Rules:**
1. Barber must be assigned to this booking.
2. Booking status must be CONFIRMED or COMPLETED.
3. Barber must wait at least 10 minutes after the booking's `startTime` before marking it as no-show.
4. If the booking was COMPLETED by the barber (using verification code), it cannot be marked as no-show.

exec: // Change password to wrong value → expect 401

request.description: Fetches a list of all available avatars.
Returns today's confirmed booking count and today's completed booking count for the authenticated barber.
Returns today's CONFIRMED bookings for the barber, sorted by startTime ascending. Fields: id, bookingNumber, userImage, userName, services[], startTime.

query.description: Number of notifications to return. Default: 20, Max: 50.
ISO datetime from previous response.nextCursor for pagination.
